results.title: Norway Chess: Praggnanandhaa falls to Firouzja in round 2, Wesley So defeats Gukesh; Deshmukh beats Humpy in all-Indian clash
results.description: Oslo: Alireza Firouzja defeated India’s R Praggnanandhaa 3-0 in round 2 of Norway Chess 2026, while the match between Wesley So and D Gukesh was drawn, with So taking the Armageddon win, as per a press release from Norway Chess. In an all-Indian women’s clash, Divya Deshmukh registered an Armageddon win over Koneru Humpy. In [...] The post Norway Chess: Praggnanandhaa falls to Firouzja in round 2, Wesley So defeats Gukesh; Deshmukh beats Humpy in all-Indian clash appeared first on KalingaTV .

results.title: Juventus to retain Yildiz but plan additional sale, says CEO Comolli
results.description: May 27 : Juventus will not sell winger Kenan Yildiz and want to retain forward Dusan Vlahovic but may need to offload an additional player to balance their finances, chief executive Damien Comolli said in an interview published on Wednesday.Juve finished sixth in Serie A and will compete in the Europa League

results.title: Curacao At FIFA World Cup 2026: Tiny Island Nation Readies For Its Ultimate Football Adventure
results.description: Curacao, the smallest country to ever qualify for the FIFA World Cup, is gripped by football fever. The tiny Caribbean island nation, with a land area of 171 square miles, has a population of just over 150,000. And come June 14, 'The Blue Wave,' as the national team is known colloquially, will embark on a journey they have never taken: a Group E opener against four-time winners Germany, then fixtures against Ecuador on 21 June and the Ivory Coast four days later present them with more opportunities to create football history. With legendary Dick Advocaat back at the helm, many Curacaoans will have their faith in Leandro Bacuna & Co. to make some waves. This is a photo feature capturing Curacaoan society with football at its core as the country prepares for its biggest global adventure.
